title: View on how many automations deleted and improvements to speed of board
excerpt: I have been deleting automations within my board which are no longer needed or simplifying them. It would be great to have a way of seeing how many have been deleted on each board so that I can show the improvements made…

posts.author: Lizblake254 (Lizzy Blake)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have been deleting automations within my board which are no longer needed or simplifying them. It would be great to have a way of seeing how many have been deleted on each board so that I can show the improvements made.

It would also be good to see the speed increase for running time of automations due to simplification and removal of automations no longer needed.
